Zenetti:

"We were winning for seven years in a row so it was perfectly natural that (would end), at a time when the ownership changed twice in three years," he said.

"Now we are at the stage of trying to build an important team ... where the club wants to be in the best 10 in the world. That is what we are working for but you can't do that overnight. You need time, a strategic plan."

He said it was not just a case of the new owners trying to buy their way out of trouble.

"You do it by building a team with good players but also with human values and with planning," he said.

"If we also buy players in the future that will help...but we have to spend intelligently, choosing players who fit in with what we are looking for."

"The first thing we are looking to do is get back into (the Champions League), where we feel at home."

Rivals AC Milan's new Chinese owners have said they were planning to invest in a stadium. Zanetti said Inter would be happy to jointly renovate San Siro, possibly reducing its capacity to improve the atmosphere.

"Inter has been ready with the project for more than one year," he said. "I hope that this situation can be resolved quickly."

"San Siro is one of the most beautiful stadiums in the world and to remodel this stadium and bring new alternatives within the stadium would be a fundamental strategy for us," he added.

He said that Inter's fans could rest assured Suning would respect the club's traditions.

"Suning has great respect for the identity and history of the club and for that reason we are working together to get Inter back to the big competitions," he said.

Zanetti, who retired three seasons ago at the age of 40, said he was still learning the ropes in his new role.

"For me it's a big challenge and I thank the owners who have shown me a lot of confidence and made me an important part of the club," he said.

"As soon as I got to Inter (in 1995), I realised it was going to be my home. It's a club that for me has, is and always will be very important."

Inter pursuing Tottenham defenders Walker & Alderweireld: the situation

After a stretch of disappointing results, Inter is looking to the future. As reported by Sky Sport, the main focus is on the defense on top of the familiar names of Manolas, Rudiger, De Vrij and Samir the nerazzurri are also looking in England. Inter is in fact interested in two Tottenham players Kyle Walker and Toby Alderweireld. The Belgian central defender has an exit clause of 28 million and has already told Spurs he doesn't want to extend his contract- Inter has made the initial contacts with the player's entourage. Another option is Porto's Felipe a player they have scouted multiple times. Inter is focused on improving their defense next summer, their shopping list is growing.

Toby Alderweireld 正喎

INTER ACHIEVES UEFA BREAK-EVEN TARGET FOR 2016/17
F.C. Internazionale is pleased to announce it has achieved its break-even target under the terms of Financial Fair Play
21/04/2017 - 16:30
MILAN - F.C. Internazionale Milano has today been informed by UEFA and the Club Financial Control Body that it has achieved the break-even target of a maximum deficit of €30 million for the reporting period 2016 under the terms of the Settlement Agreement signed with UEFA in 2015.

Thanks to this positive result the Club is not liable to pay the conditional amount of €7 million in withheld revenue.

The 2016 result follows a deficit break-even of €110 million for the reporting period 2015, an improvement of some €80 million.

According to the Settlement Agreement with UEFA the Club must achieve a break-even of €0 million for the period 2017.

F.C. INTERNAZIONALE STATEMENT


The Club confirms its full backing in Stefano Pioli and his staff. The squad will begin an extended ‘ritiro’ on Tuesday to prepare for the Napoli game

MILAN - Following Saturday’s result against ACF Fiorentina, the Club has called the entire first team squad in for an extended ‘ritiro’ at the Suning Training Centre at Appiano starting tomorrow Tuesday 25 April midday and lasting until the home game against S.S.C. Napoli on Sunday 30 April.

The manner of the defeat at Fiorentina was unacceptable for our supporters both in Italy and abroad, and we are determined to put this right. Everyone at the Club, from the players to all staff, is now focused on working as hard as possible to achieve the maximum result and finish the season strongly.

In order to achieve this, the Club confirms its full backing and that of the ownership in Stefano Pioli and his entire technical team. Pioli joined Inter at a difficult time and the work he has carried out together with his staff over the six months, since he joined the Club in November last year, has been exceptional and deserves our full respect. The Club will not be distracted by rumours circulated by those outside of the Club.

Our target remains to finish as a high as possible in Serie A and qualify for European competition, by giving the maximum in every match, and for the players to represent the Club’s colours with honour and pride as befits the history and tradition of this great Club.

Eto'o: 'Inter Champions or die trying'

Samuel Eto’o reveals he told Jose Mourinho’s Inter squad that they must “win the Champions League Final or die trying” in 2010.

That side became the first Italian club to win the Treble of Scudetto, Coppa Italia and Champions League by beating Bayern Munich.

“Mourinho did something that few others would’ve done,” revealed Eto’o on Sky Italia talk show ‘E po c’e Cattelan.’

“He gave his team talk ahead of the game, then said: ‘Now Samuel will tell us how we’ll win this evening.’ I have to thank him for that.

“In the Final you win if you step on to the field to win, not if you go out there to play. Each of us thought of how much we suffered to reach that point, winning against Chelsea and Barcelona, to get to a Final Inter hadn’t been in for 40 years.

“I said that I had played many Finals, but that was the most special. We had to do something for the people, for the Inter population who deserved it.

“I said ‘either we win the Champions League or we die trying. We’ve got to die on that pitch to bring home the cup or we’ll die because we don’t return to Milan with the Cup.’ Fortunately, it all went well.”

Inter won 2-0 on the night, on May 22 2010, thanks to a Diego Milito brace at the Santiago Bernabeu in Madrid.

西班牙媒體報導稱，馬德里體育會主帥施蒙尼拒絕了國際米蘭的邀請。

在干地確定留在車路士後，馬體會主帥施蒙尼成為了國際選帥的首選，媒體稱國際準備為施蒙尼提供一份豐厚的薪水，並且賦予他很大的轉會權利。同時，球隊體育總監奧西里奧還來到了西班牙和施蒙尼的教練團隊進行了會面。

不過《馬卡報》稱施蒙尼謝絕了國際的邀請，他目前準備繼續帶領馬體會征戰。

國際目前不得不考慮其他選擇，這其中包括羅馬主帥史柏尼迪。

據兩家意大利媒體報導，曼聯門將沙治奧羅美路將和國際米蘭簽約2年。

現年30歲的沙治奧羅美路本賽季在各項賽事只為曼聯出場了14次，他和曼聯的合同將在2018年6月到期，據悉他很可能重返意甲賽場。

據Mediaset Premium報導，他們得到消息，沙治奧羅美路已經在米蘭置業。而《全市場網》報導，沙治奧羅美路將和國際米蘭簽約2年。

另外，AC米蘭對他也有興趣，但無論他加盟米蘭城哪支球隊，他都將是後備門將。

沙治奧羅美路此前也有過在意大利征戰的經歷，他在2011-15賽季效力於森多利亞。

Berardi:

"I was born with a Nerazzurro heart because parent pass certain things onto their children," the 22-year-old explained.

"They [Inter] won the faith of my father and brother, but not my mother Maria who supports Juve."

Berardi added that his Inter boyhood idols included Brazilian Ronaldo and Argentine Diego Milito.

"As a boy I feasted my eyes on Ronaldo, the phenomenon. When I was 15 it was Milito's turn. That evening in Madrid I went out with friends to celebrate.

"Every boy who loves football has a team in their heart, don't they?"

Despite his love for Inter, Berardi is refusing to get carried away by speculation linking him with a move to San Siro.

"I said I supported Inter long before the speculation linking Inter to my future.

"I have read that they are monitoring me. In their project there will be new signings, possibly Italian, they are discussing it.

"But I won't discuss it, we will see at the end of the season."

Ausilio喺大學講座提到，換咗兩次班主，三個唔同嘅管理模式，每一年重訂project，所帶黎嘅不穩定性。

每一日報紙都話國米會簽大球星，但個事實係我地要面對Salary cap。我地嘅盈利係200m-300m，但係每年入歐冠啲祖雲係400m。

祖記升返上黎之後可以有好穩定嘅project，有自己嘅經營模式，青訓系統，同埋管理視野觸覺。佢地可以好穩定咁做呢啲野，咁就係同其他意大利球隊唔同嘅地方。咁唔係買球星可以做到，因為最好嘅球員係會去有歐冠踢、賺好多錢嘅地方。球星係想贏。

國米曾經bid過dybala，但爭祖雲20m。依加唔可能投資200m-300m落轉會市場，唔係國米唔想，係不可能。即使蘇寧有咁嘅能力，但我地要面對現實，個現實係Financial fair play管制球會財務發展。

我地需要啲時間去搞好個球隊管理，盡量減少錯誤。

part 2

一開季我地迎接咗新嘅班主，一個舊教練帶領咗整個季前賽，但喺開季前一星期，我地諗咗上千個理由炒佢或者佢自己走。

之後請咗個毫不熟識意甲嘅教練。即使唔洗諗都知道呢個唔會係最好嘅方式展開球季，因為好多野都比其他隊落後。佢會相信某啲球員多於其他人。

我地要重新製定訓練方式，認識球員，同埋建立球隊嘅理念。

管理球隊就好似管理企業一樣，你唔計劃好就會有負面影響。今年我地無計劃好，一年換咗四個教訓，最終我地排第7-8。

依加個個都話國米陣容唔夠好，但幾個月前大家先話國米係祖雲主要對手。艾歷尼、沙里、史巴列堤都一樣係咁講。但你如果無一個好嘅計劃，最後就會所有野都唔同晒。

作為一支球隊，我地必須要有良好嘅溝通。當國米作客祖雲，報紙就吹行話干地會黎取代皮奧利。然後我地輸咗，整個星期嘅報章都係圍繞國米換帥。

喺呢個情況國米必須支持教練。電視係廿四小時廣播，所以要換新聞攝air time。意大利唔同其他國家，其他國家唔會有三、四份報紙日刊只係專注於體育，所以呢啲報紙要搵野講，就要去講啲球員同教練。

祖雲好強大，佢地有四至五個主要球員，呢幾個球員係無可取代，為球隊帶黎咗體系、格調、心態，我地會留意吓佢地失去咗佢地之後會點運作。

當國米失去咗J辛、甘比、大米同森美爾，就等於失去咗曾經經歷低谷而渴望爭勝嘅球員。

唔係球員無好好操練，我地每一日都有去訓練。不過呢到就係無團結精神，球員無辦法製造一個來自不同年齡、背景同種族、性格同價值觀嘅圈子。

佢地唔係壞人，佢地每朝一齊抵達，食早餐，訓練同食晏，但佢地有自己嘅問題。呢個並唔係一個球員互相團結信任嘅團隊，而係有好多小圈子，並且有啲人只想到自己。無人會為團隊付出更多，團結力量並不存在。

干地類型嘅教練？我地會嘗試解決教練問題，會考慮相關特性嘅教練，但你要睇吓呢啲教練依加係教緊車仔、熱刺、馬體會同祖記，都要考慮現實。情況。

Di Marzio:

Inter is looking to turn the corner after a difficult season. Today Walter Sabatini, Piero Ausilio and Steven Zhang met in Rome for three hours to make plans for the summer window- as reported by Sky Sport the club wants to keep Icardi, Handanovic, Candreva, D'Ambrosio, Medel, Gagliardini and Pinamonti. There are doubts about Kondogbia and Perisic (who would fetch a significant return to invest in market) as well as Andreolli, Eder and Miranda. Those expected to leave include Brozovic, Murillo, Palacio, Carrizo and Gabigol, who would leave only on loan.

On the incoming side, Inter continues to focus on Manolas and Rudiger, as well as Pepe and De Vrij. For the midfield Strootman and Nainggolan are still targets, while Tolisso is becoming a more popular objective within Inter's management team. Up front the targets are Bernardeschi and Berardi while for Di Maria so far there's only been an initial contact. Inter is focused on the summer transfer window.

Inter Milan Receive Loan Offer From La Liga Side for Disappointing Brazilian Youngster


Inter Milan are reportedly ready to allow Gabigol to leave the San Siro on loan to see if he can get back to something like his promising old self.
​

The Serie A club have lost their patience with the youngster, who was once courted by Arsenal, Liverpool and Barcelona, and will now allow him to leave on a temporary basis.


They have received an offer from La Liga side Las Palmas according to ​calciomercato.com and boss Luciano Spalletti will strongly consider the offer.
​

The Spanish club, who placed 14th in the table this season, will ask Inter to pay part of Gabigol's €2.7m-a-year salary for the underwhelming star, whom much was expected of this season.


He only made 10 appearances across all competitions and scored one goal since joining the club from Santos last summer and had drawn comparisons to that of Neymar, who also played for the Brazilian club before moving to Europe for big money.
​
​The fact that speculation now surrounds a loan deal to Las Palmas can be seen as quite the fall from grace for Gabigol - real name Gabriel Barbosa - who almost joined Barcelona ahead of the Nerazzurri last summer, but for the Italians to seal the deal ahead of the Catalans.

Palacio, 35, brought an end to five years with Inter at the weekend, playing the final 30 minutes of their 5-2 win over Udinese at the San Siro.

The forward did not manage to open his account for a season in which he has appeared just 15 times, but the Curva Nord -- Inter's hardcore supporters -- paid tribute to him on his final appearance.

"It's a very emotional moment," he said. "I'm very happy -- these have been five really beautiful years and I've given everything for Inter and this shirt. I'd like to thank everybody who's been with me.

"It's a pity that these have been difficult years, but I've played for Inter, the biggest club in the world, so I'm happy. We maybe had different objectives this season, but we've shown in our final games that we have pride wearing this shirt."

Palacio, who is out of contract at the end of June, is one of several players Inter are looking to move on this summer, although he says he plans to continue playing in Serie A next season.

On Friday in Italy, Inter's director Piero Ausilio was meeting with agent Beppe Bozzo, the agent of Fiorentina's Federico Bernardeschi. Inter is doing their homework but are not fully committed to buying him. During the meeting, Ausilio and Bozzo spoke about other players who could be leaving Inter for teams abroad, while Inter's intentions appear to be not to make any concrete offers to Fiorentina for the forward. Ausilio's focus is on a central defender, his top options are Roma's Rudiger and Sampdoria's Milan Skriniar, Contacts with the agent of Borja Valero remain open and active, and Inter will look to accelerate that deal with Fiorentina next week

Benevento, Puscas will stay another year and they have requested Caprari: the latest

Benevento are taking the initiative for their first Serie A season. The Campania side can count on George Puscas to stay another season. The playoff hero is staying after yesterday's meeting with Inter. Benevento have also redeemed Bright Gyamfi and have asked for Gianluca Caprari from Inter. It will difficult to sign the striker, who played for Pescara last season, because Sassuolo, Fiorentina and Atalanta are also interested. Another name that has been requested from Inter is Andrew Gravillon, a defender from their Primavera squad. Benevento are looking for a young starting goalkeeper and they are interested in Atalanta's Radunovic, as well as Napoli's Luigi Sepe.

Fiorentina released a statement announcing they will take legal action after Borja Valero bitterly criticised the club.

An audio recording was doing the rounds on social media in Florence today, purported to be from the Spanish midfielder.

“I haven’t signed anything with anyone and if I haven’t done it, then it was more for the fans than the club,” he said while fighting back tears.

“I would like to come out in the open and talk, but I am under contract with Fiorentina and I can’t do it. I have always been honest, the day I can do so, I’ll hold a Press conference to explain to the people what really happened.

“I am still not 100 per cent sure I’m leaving Fiorentina, but I’ll certainly have to because I can’t take this anymore. They made my cry and lose sleep for weeks.”

This evening, the club released a statement effectively confirming it was Borja Valero on the recording.

“ACF Fiorentina inform that, in the light of the statements emerging from an audio message from its player Borja Valero and repeated in various media settings, the club has handed the matter over to its legal department for every opportune action.”

The player continues to insist he is being forced into a transfer to Inter, whereas Fiorentina’s position is that he will only be sold if he asks to leave.

Borja Valero recently got a tattoo on his arm marking the coordinates of the Ponte Vecchio in Florence.

Luciano Spalletti is confident Inter “will keep their promises” on squad reinforcements, will bring Ivan Perisic to China and is “working on” Radja Nainggolan.

The Coach spoke to reporters after a 2-1 friendly defeat to Bundesliga 2 side Nurnberg.

“It went well today, because the important thing was to avoid injuries. As for the game itself, at times they tried to do what we discussed in training, in others they didn’t and got stretched out, so this is all good material to discuss.”

Suning Group director Walter Sabatini said yesterday that the Nerazzurri would bring in reinforcements from the market.

“I feel reassured in every way. Clearly we had some discussions and when you make a promise, you have to maintain it, so I am confident it’ll happen. Because those two, three, four players we need to put into the squad don’t necessarily have to be top champions, but simply completing the team in those areas that are lacking.”

Perisic was absent from today’s friendly because he visited his personal dentist in Croatia. Amid Manchester United interest, does that mean the winger won’t be going on Inter’s pre-season tour of China next week?

“If nothing changes, then Perisic will come to China. He had an abscess in his tooth and it was clearly visible even to the naked eye, so he preferred to go to his personal medic who has been seeing him for a long time.”

This evening, Nainggolan is having a meeting with Monchi to discuss a new Roma contract, so are Inter still pushing for the midfielder?

“That is something the directors are working on. As I said, we need to let certain situations mature and Nainggolan is one of them. It has been talked about and the directors are keeping that in mind.

“We’ve got a good team with many players who haven’t expressed themselves to their full potential and those who arrive will help complete the side. We don’t need to have an extraordinary transfer market to aspire to the top four.”

都六月中了，還未簽到球星，但國米撚說：「不緊要，依家努力搵銀填數，第時過咗FFP你荒（慌）無女？」

結果，國米撚賣了一個又一個球員，搵夠贊助；接近七月時，發覺隔離街都洗撚咗成億，原來六月尾係買球員既好Timing。國米撚依然一個，但他說：「不緊要，即將係我地踏入七月大展拳腳既時候，亦係我地稱霸意甲既開始！」

國米撚耐心等待，七月頭（傳FFP已完），七月中，七月都就過去了，依然簽唔到球星，只簽到一堆幼齒和廢老。但他終於達成了心願，賣走了班尼加同一眾二打六 － 賺夠30m過FFP。

國米撚等到八月，開始疑惑：「點解我地已經過咗7月FFP大限，但仲係簽唔到球星？」更令他驚訝的是，意甲不少大牌都簽咗其他波，但那些球隊都係中資喎，例如，邦老師既球隊都係中資，老闆只係香港商人，比蘇寧在中國名聲既足足少了幾倍！點解？唔係過到FFP成為有錢波就有球星既咩？

不知不覺國米撚等到了二零四六年，隊波已無什麼出明球員，自己渡過一個又一個既轉會窗及煞科戰。

拉素與基達鬧翻 國米趁虛而入？

前幾日拉素翼鋒基達私自離隊前往米蘭會女友，之後加盟國米嘅謠言滿天飛。今日拉素對陣Triestina嘅友賽中，基達連後備都無得做，要自己一個做體能訓練。據說呢個決定係拉素同主帥恩沙基共同作出，為咗向國米傳達一個訊息：基達嘅未來會由拉素一方決定，無人能夠介入。

隨即基達喺自己嘅Twitter到表達不滿：「我已經準備好晒！我隨時都準備好貢獻我嘅價值同專業，但今日球隊決定唔出我！」
